cluster.name: A100_SuperPod_01
cluster.description: NVIDIA DGX A100 SuperPod cluster with 32 racks, liquid-cooled InfiniBand + NVLink3 fabric, scaling to 8 192 GPUs.

bottleneck_analysis.bottleneck: Inter-rack InfiniBand HDR bandwidth and latency (~150 ns, 25.6 TB/s bisection).
bottleneck_analysis.description: At large scale, the HDR InfiniBand fabric becomes latency-bound during global collective operations like all-reduce or broadcast. Even though total bandwidth is high, synchronization latency across racks limits end-to-end throughput.
bottleneck_analysis.workload_characteristic: Large-scale data-parallel or model-parallel LLM training (e.g., GPT-3, LLaMA-65B) performing frequent all-reduce and parameter synchronization across racks, causing cross-pod communication stalls.

sources: NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPU Architecture Whitepaper (2020)
NVIDIA DGX A100 System Architecture Guide (2021)
NVIDIA NVSwitch and NVLink3 Technical Brief (2020)
